# Openable.dev

> Run AI-generated apps without hassle

Openable.dev is the missing link between AI code generation and local development. Import, run, and edit your projects in Cursor. No Node.js, no terminal commands, no configuration.

## What is Openable?

Openable.dev is a desktop application that lets non-technical users run AI-generated code locally. It works with projects created by tools like Lovable, Bolt, v0, or any other AI code generation platform. Projects are imported via GitHub.

## Key Features

- Zero configuration: no need to install Node.js, npm, or any development tools
- Cursor friendly: built with simplicity in mind, open and edit projects directly in Cursor
- Works with any AI platform: use Lovable, Bolt, v0, or any other AI code generation platform
- GitHub integration: connect your GitHub account and clone, sync, update repositories
- One-click project setup: import a repository and run it instantly

## How It Works

1. Import your project: connect your GitHub account and select a repository
2. Openable sets everything up: dependencies are installed automatically
3. Run the app locally: start the application and open it in your browser
4. Edit code in Cursor: open the project in Cursor and start editing

## Status

The project is currently in beta. Sign up at https://openable.dev to get early access.

## Links

- Website: https://openable.dev
- Platform: macOS (Linux and Windows coming soon)
- Created by: Wunderlabs
